pr.title: PROTEUS+STYX — val_bpb 0.8495 (3-seed mean) — LeakyReLU(0.9)² + 5-gram Eval Cache

output.summary: Uses PROTEUS+STYX with LeakyReLU(0.9)² and a backward-looking 5-gram hash cache blended into sliding-window eval predictions.
techniques: LeakyReLU(0.9)² activation replacing the standard slope for the base stack
Backward-looking 5-gram hash cache blended with model logits at fixed alpha during sliding-window eval
